label: Transparent oak savanna motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Oak Savanna transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete oak savanna motif for a design-system catalog, isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A mature spreading oak tree with sculptural dark branches, clustered oak-green canopy, tawny gold prairie grass at the base, a few acorns and small leaf details integrated naturally. The motif should read as grassland woodland, balanced and civic, with crisp opaque edges and no cast shadow.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding, full canopy and grass base visible without cropping; compact emblem-like natural specimen, not a full landscape scene.
Lighting/mood: clear daylight color, natural texture, calm balanced silhouette.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal, uniform color only, no shadow, gradient, texture, reflection, floor plane, watermark, or text. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no people, no animals, no buildings, no road, no sky background, no horizon line, no decorative frame, no watermark, no text.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Oak Savanna light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named Morphous Oak Savanna, derived from an oak savanna motif: mature spreading oak canopy, dark bark, gold prairie grass, oak green leaves, acorns, open sky, and grassland woodland civic balance.
Canvas: exact 3840x2160 wide 16:9 high-resolution board. Use a precise grid with large readable labels and no tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: Morphous Oak Savanna, Oak Savanna, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
System feel: balanced civic system for public dashboards, registries, planning tools, service portals, and operational workspaces. Calm, trustworthy, ordered, generous but not decorative.
Reference use: Extract palette and material language from gold grass, oak green, bark umber, pale sky, acorn tan, and meadow neutrals. Use motif-derived near-neutrals only.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, navigation groups, sidebar, command palette, tables, metrics, charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing, radius, borders, shadows, and token swatches.
Visual language: shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI, 8px radii, civic layout rhythm, stable columns, clear hierarchy, subtle grass-line texture, oak branch dividers, sky-tinted surfaces, accessible contrast.
Typography: include English UI type guidance and Japanese UI type guidance with short readable labels.
Text: use short readable UI labels, accurate title spelling: Morphous Oak Savanna.
Constraints: no generic blue-purple gradients, no neon colors, no one-note beige palette, no stock landing page, no tiny unreadable paragraphs, no random brand names, no watermark.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Oak Savanna dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn board for Morphous Oak Savanna that feels like the light board translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Canvas: exact 3840x2160 wide 16:9 high-resolution board. Use a precise grid with large readable labels and no tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: Morphous Oak Savanna, Oak Savanna, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
System feel: balanced civic system for public dashboards, registries, planning tools, service portals, and operational workspaces. Calm, trustworthy, ordered, generous but not decorative.
Reference use: Preserve oak-green primary actions, golden-grass review states, sky-blue information states, acorn tan highlights, bark umber surfaces, and meadow neutral dividers from a light-mode Oak Savanna civic design-system board.
Visual details: dark background derived from charcoal bark and dusk meadow, light text from cloud mist and pale grass, restrained contrast, subtle bark and dry grass texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls, accessible focus rings.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, navigation groups, sidebar, command palette, tables, metrics, charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing, radius, borders, shadows, and token swatches.
Typography: include English UI type guidance and Japanese UI type guidance with short readable labels.
Text: use short readable UI labels, accurate title spelling: Morphous Oak Savanna.
Constraints: no neon palette, no generic pure-black UI, no unrelated purple gradients, no one-note brown palette, no tiny unreadable paragraphs, no random brand names, no watermark.
